description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and olive drab color scheme. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine. The upper receiver has a mounted optical sight, likely a red dot or holographic type, and the handguard includes a rail system for accessory attachments. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing its suitability for urban environments. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a robust yet lightweight feel. The rifle's compact size and modular features make it ideal for close-quarters operations.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, suppressor, and mounted optic, finished in black and olive drab. Features include a rail system, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, rail system, mounted optic, and suppressor clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, barrel alignment, and the narrow profile of the handguard and sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and optic from the left, with accessory rails visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the upper receiver and sight.
